summary: Completed backend testing of Batch 2 & 3 Audit Fixes. All 17 tests passed (100% success rate). Verified: 1) Centralized StateMachine validation blocks invalid transitions for non-admin users, 2) Warranty IDOR protection - customers get 403 when accessing other customers' warranties, 3) Smartflo webhook dedup - duplicate webhook calls return 'duplicate' status, 4) GST precision - CGST/SGST properly rounded to 2 decimals, 5) Basic API health checks (auth, tickets, warranties) all working.
critical_code_review_comments: StateMachine class (lines 212-343) correctly implements centralized state machine with validate_transition() and get_allowed_transitions() methods
Warranty IDOR protection (lines 4432-4451) correctly checks customer_id, email, and phone to verify ownership before allowing access
Smartflo webhook dedup (lines 35568-35575) correctly checks for existing uuid before processing new webhook
GST precision fix (lines 5251-5253, 20475-20477, 26355-26357) correctly rounds CGST/SGST to 2 decimals using round(gst_amount / 2, 2)
seed_data_creation: Created test warranties with TEST-IDOR prefix for IDOR testing, test webhooks with test-webhook/test-dedup prefix for dedup testing, test credit notes with TEST-GST-PRECISION prefix for GST precision testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 2 & 3 audit fixes fully tested and verified. All security fixes (Warranty IDOR, Smartflo webhook dedup) and accuracy fixes (GST precision) are working correctly. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_batch2_3_audit_fixes.py can be reused for regression testing.

tests: test_customer_can_access_own_warranty - PASSED (customer can access their own warranty)
test_admin_can_access_any_warranty - PASSED (admin can access any warranty)
test_different_uuid_not_duplicate - PASSED (different uuid processed as new)
test_sales_invoice_gst_precision - PASSED (existing invoices have 2 decimal precision)
test_credit_note_gst_precision - PASSED (existing credit notes have 2 decimal precision)
test_create_credit_note_gst_precision - PASSED (new credit note CGST/SGST rounded to 2 decimals)

fixes_tested: Warranty IDOR Protection - Customers cannot access other customers' warranties (403 returned)
Smartflo Webhook Dedup - Duplicate webhook calls with same uuid return 'duplicate' status
GST Precision - CGST/SGST properly rounded to 2 decimals in sales invoices and credit notes
Centralized StateMachine - Ticket status transitions validated through StateMachine.validate_transition()
